response.justification: Bogdan Szabo has extensive experience in software development, including performance optimization and system architecture, but lacks direct experience with AI accelerators, SoC/IP modeling, and hardware-software co-design required for the role. His background is more aligned with web, mobile, and embedded systems, with limited exposure to deep neural network optimization or GPU architecture.
strengths: Strong software engineering background with experience in performance optimization
Experience with system architecture and hardware-software co-design in embedded systems
Proven ability to work across multiple programming languages and technologies
concerns: No demonstrated experience with AI accelerators, SoC/IP modeling, or deep neural network optimization
Lacks required qualifications (degree level + experience) compared to the role's expectations (e.g., no PhD, Master's with 6+ years, or Bachelor's with 8+ years)
Limited exposure to GPU architecture or SIMD/MIMD optimization techniques

key_factors.factor: AI accelerator and deep learning optimization experience
Software engineering and system architecture experience
